---
title: "Pest Risk and Proximity to Urban Areas and Import Centers"
author: "Mathis Erler"
date: today
---

## About this project

This analysis investigates how proximity to urban areas and plant import
centers affects the risk of growers encountering an invasive insect pest
that affects multiple cultivated crops, including orchids.

*Full analysis coming soon.*

## R session info

```{r}
#| label: session-info
#| echo: false

sessionInfo()
```
